desc: and Drusus AR Drachm of Caesarea, Cappadocia. 32/33 AD. TI CAES AVG P M TR P XXXIV, laureate head of Tiberius right / DRVSVS CAES TI AVG F COS P IT, bare head of Drusus left. Syd 4
AR drachm, struck in Caesarea, Cappadocia in AD 33-34. TI CAES AVG PM TR P XXXV, laureate head of Tiberius right. / DRVSVS CAES TI AVG F COS II TR P IT, bare head of Drusus Caesar
and Drusus AR Drachm. 33/34 AD. TI CAES AVG P M TR P XXXV, laureate head of Tiberius right / DRVSVS CAES TI AVG F COS II TR P, bare head of Drusus left. Syd 47, RSC 2. Text
